fixes.origin:
base = self.cfg["artifact_home"]
location = os.path.join(base, token)

with open(location, "rb") as fp:
    return fp.read()
fixes.replacement:
base = self.cfg["artifact_home"]
token = os.path.basename(token)
location = os.path.join(base, token)

with open(location, "rb") as fp:
    return fp.read()
